所.wiki_summary: Phono-semantic compound: phonetic 戶 + semantic 斤 ('axe'), representing 'the sound of logging'.

然.wiki_summary: Phono-semantic compound: phonetic 肰 + semantic 火 ('fire'), originally meaning 'to burn'.

种.wiki_summary: Phono-semantic compound: semantic 禾 (grain) + phonetic 重.

事.wiki_summary: Ideogrammic compound: 又 ('hand') + 中 ('flagpole with a drum'), meaning 'flag in hand > to perform one's job'.
事.difference: We classify 事 as phono_semantic_compound; Wiktionary classifies it as an ideogrammic compound (會意) with no phonetic component.

成.wiki_summary: Phono-semantic compound: semantic 戊 + phonetic 丁, with original meaning relating to 'city walls'.
成.difference: We classify 成 as compound_ideograph; Wiktionary classifies it as a phono_semantic_compound with 丁 as the phonetic component.

多.wiki_summary: Ideogrammic compound: two pieces of meat (肉), later corrupted to two 夕, conveying the idea of abundance.

经.wiki_summary: Phono-semantic compound: semantic 糹 ('silk; thread') + phonetic 巠.
